item.title: SIDU Stock Gained 5% In Pre-Market Today – What Is The Deal With Simera Sense About?
item.description: The company announced a memorandum of understanding with Simera Sense to develop next-generation hyperspectral imaging technology for Earth observatio...

item.title: This Software Company Saw Significant High-Value Client Additions And An Upbeat Q4 – Stock Shot Up 17% Pre-Market Today
item.description: Datadog added considerable high-value clients, ending the year with 603 customers generating $1 million or more in annual recurring revenue.

item.title: This Software Company Saw Significant High-Value Client Additions And An Upbeat Q4 – Stock Shot Up 17% Pre-Market Today
item.description: Datadog added considerable high-value clients, ending the year with 603 customers generating $1 million or more in annual recurring revenue.

item.title: AZI Stock Reverses Early Gains To Slump 30% In Pre-Market – What Happened?
item.description: The company said it completed negotiations to acquire around $1.87 billion worth of premium digital assets from Crypto Titan for about $1.1 billion.
